series_metadata.series_description: Files contain computer listing of Lottery Agent Number order to include Agent's name, address, city, state, zip code, federal identification number or social security number and total yearly income earned amount. The information is utilized to generate yearly Internal Revenue Form 1099 for income reporting purposes. Two (2) reports are generated; a summary report defining aforementioned information and a detail report listing values, which comprise total income.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: digital copy in system seven (7) years
